NAME: Roadmap — Integrative analysis of 111 reference epigenomes
DESCRIPTION: Flagship Roadmap Epigenomics paper: integrative analysis of 111 reference human epigenomes from diverse cell types and tissues. Generated comprehensive maps of histone modifications, chromatin accessibility, DNA methylation, and RNA expression. Defined 15-chromatin-state models (ChromHMM) for each epigenome and developed the Epigenome Roadmap web portal. A foundational resource for understanding gene regulation in human health and disease.
TITLE: Integrative analysis of 111 reference human epigenomes
